title: Ore Fossilmon
description: Adds Fossilmons that can be Resurrected with Bones & Ores.
body:
How to Install
Download the latest version from Modrinth, and add the Folder to both "resourcepacks" folder and, when creating a world, to "datapacks" folder.

Discord addon link: https://discord.com/channels/934267676354834442/1261567772828241920

For suggestions, teasers, and polls, check out this discord thread: https://discord.com/channels/934267676354834442/1261193541422551100

Adds Ore Fossilmons that can be Resurrected with Bones & Ores.

It includes the following below.

Lycoalpod/Lepidoniferous
- Type: Rock/Fire
- Ore: Coal
- Prehistoric Plant: Lepidodendron
- Evolve at Level 40

Ankylub/Ankylonorse
- Type: Rock/Electric
- Ore: Copper
- Prehistoric Creature: Ankylosaurus
- Evolve at Level 39 While It's Raining

Airaptor/Velocigaletor
- Type: Rock/Steel
- Ore: Iron
- Prehistoric Creature: Velociraptor
- Evolve at Level 39

Thagolt/Stegostormus
- Type: Rock/Electric
- Ore: Gold
- Prehistoric Creature: Stegosaurus
- Evolve at Level 39 While It's Raining and Thundering

Thagma/Kentrocano
- Type: Rock/Fire
- Ore: Nether Gold
- Prehistoric Creature: Kentrosaurus
- Evolve at Level 39 While It's Day Time

Hadrosong/Parasonorous
- Type: Rock/Fairy
- Ore: Diamond
- Prehistoric Creature: Parasaurolophus
- Evolve at Level 39 While It's Day Time

Emerald: Dirtops/Triceraearth
- Type: Rock/Psychic
- Ore: Emerald
- Prehistoric Creature: Triceratops
- Evolve at Level 39

Sapsaur/Brahcioforest
- Type: Rock/Grass
- Ore: Resin Brick (For Now Dark Oak Sapling)
- Prehistoric Creature: Brachiosaurus
- Evolve at Level 39 While It's Day Time

Dimeazuli/Dimetrochant
- Type: Rock/Fairy
- Ore: Lapis Lazuli
- Prehistoric Creature: Dimetrodon
- Evolve at Level 37

Arthropeater/Comparapede
- Type: Rock/Electric
- Ore: Redstone Dust
- Prehistoric Creature: Arthropleura
- Evolve at Level 40

Ichthyst
- Type: Rock/Psychic
- Ore: Amethyst Shard
- Prehistoric Creature: Ichthyosaurus

Pariartz/Scutoquartz
- Type: Rock/Fire
- Ore: Nether Quartz
- Prehistoric Creature: Scutosaurus
- Evolve at Level 37

Spinot/Spinospecter
- Type: Rock/Ghost
- Ore: Netherite
- Prehistoric Creature: Spinosaurus
- Evolve at Level 39 While It's Night Time

Gigant/Giganotodread
- Type: Rock/Dark
- Ore: Gilded Blackstone
- Prehistoric Creature: Giganotosaurus
- Evolve at Level 39 While It's Night Time

Silestone/Heterok, Plateonyx, Coelosky
- Type: Rock/Normal->Rock/Normal, Ground, Flying 
- Ore: Tumblestones
- Prehistoric Creature: Silessaurus, Heterodontosaurus, Plateosaurus, & Coelophysis
- Heterok: Evolve Using Tumblestone
- Plateonyx: Evolve Using Black Tumblestone
- Coelosky: Evolve Using Sky Tumblestone

Evolutionary Stones
Gorgorok/Inostrasidian
- Type: Rock/Fire
- Stone: Fire Stone
- Prehistoric Creature: Inostrancevia
- Evolve at Level 40

Edastone/Edaphosedi
- Type: Rock/Water
- Stone: Water Stone
- Prehistoric Creature: Edaphosaurus
- Evolve at Level 37

Diicbolt/Lystrowatt
- Type: Rock/Electric
- Stone: Thunder Stone
- Prehistoric Creature: Lystrosaurus
- Evolve at Level 40

Zinoblade/Therizinoscythe
- Type: Rock/Grass
- Stone: Leaf Stone
- Prehistoric Creature: Therizinosaurus
- Evolve at Level 37

Yutyrunt/Yutyrantrum
- Type: Rock/Ice
- Stone: Ice Stone
- Prehistoric Creature: Yutyrannus
- Evolve at Level 39 While It's Night Time

Abelimight/Carnobrawlrus
- Type: Rock/Fighting
- Stone: Sun Stone
- Prehistoric Creature: Carnotaurus
- Evolve at Level 30

Dryopsi/Iguanopsionic
- Type: Rock/Psychic
- Stone: Moon Stone
- Prehistoric Creature: Iguanodon
- Evolve at Level 30

Pterae/Pteranodawn
- Type: Rock/Fairy
- Stone: Dawn Stone
- Prehistoric Creature: Pteranodon
- Evolve at Level 39 While It's Day Time

Mosaga/Mosaduskrus
- Type: Rock/Dark
- Stone: Dusk Stone
- Prehistoric Creature: Mosasaurus
- Evolve at Level 39 While It's Night Time

Pteropix/Azhfaegon/Quetzalazteclus
- Type: Rock/Steel->Fairy/Steel 
- Stone: Shiny Stone
- Prehistoric Creature: Quetzalcoatlus
- Evolve at Level 24
- Evolve at Level 48
